result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  Hypermedia.Generator [options]

Options:
  --schema-file <schema-file>    schemaFile
  --type <type>                  type
  --language <language>          language
  --template <template>          template
  --output-file <output-file>    outputFile
  --namespace <namespace>        namespace []
  --include-file <include-file>  includeFile []
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
